reviews.review_description:
Until you can save the game it's 100% pointless. You start anew every single time. It's fun to play, but who wants to play something that's wiped clean every time you play? I've owned it for over a year and the saving issue has never been fixed. I'll retry every couple of months to check...and still it's been more than a year and it's not fixed. I'm updating this review on 6/7/2026. If you're someone thinking about purchasing this, there will never be any updates so don't buy it if you're counting on it. I kept it in hopes it would be fixed. It never was.

6 months ago-Update:Almost everyday this week a dot has showed up in this game meaning its been updated. I've noticed the customers are coming in faster. More dirt to clean up. Definitely makes it more fun. But the same issue thats making it a waste of time is still not working. I could really enjoy the game if I could save my progress. Everytime I see the dot I check the game. Delete any data. Still it won't SAVE!! Can it be that hard to fix??

reviews.review_title: A very good game! Impressed by
reviews.review_description: Coffee Shop Simulator is one of those games that surprised me completely. The gameplay mechanics are intuitive but have a real learning curve — managing orders, customizing drinks, and keeping customers happy feels genuinely satisfying in VR. The complexity grows naturally as you progress, without feeling overwhelming. What impressed me most is how much potential this game has — the foundation is solid and it's clear a lot of thought went into the experience. If you enjoy simulation games, this is absolutely worth it. Can't wait to see how it evolves
Can you please add snap turning and adjust height options please!

I just bought this game and I ordered the stock etc then I put the cakes and buns in the glass display and put the coffee cups and syrups on the worktop then I hit save/load then went back through only to discover that it deleted everything nothing was there so with the result of that I wasn’t amused! So I just turned it off. This game needs to be sorted because also trying to pick things up it doesn’t always work.

I spawn in very short, and not one button brings up a menu, I'm BELOW the counter!!! I also had a friend buy this game and she can't get items off the floor unless she changes her height!!! WHO TF wants to keep doing that!! I'll get a refund if there's no response in a week...

developer_response.body:
Go in the office room of the Coffee Shop, there will be a desktop monitor. That is the Menu. You can save, load, you need to pay bills and order coffee products from there. Read the paper on the counter in the coffee shop first and also in the office room. 😁 
I think is better that you ask for the refund as you say, it seems this game does not fit you if you can't even start the game 😄

reviews.review_description:
Love this game, wish I could give it 5 stars. The only reason I haven't given this game 1 star is because its genuinely fun. But the save doesn't work. I got really far into the game and lost all my progress because I click save game but it doesn't do anything. Please fix this so that I can actually play it! I didn't pay 15 dollars for this game to NOT SAVE MY PROGRESS.


Edit: I am now giving it 1 star until you fix the save feature. Once you fix the save feature I will add more stars.

developer_response.body: You can save from the PC in the office, there is the option to save or load the game.

reviews.review_description:
20 Aug 2024

No save capability.

Can not pick flat things off the floor. They did disappear after I closed. 

Delivery items are a pain to collect. 

Reach in cooler doors will not shut.

No trashbag to collect.

No crouch capability.

Milk does not always work.

I like that this one is not as ultra complex as others but it still needs a lot of work.

reviews.review_title: needs an update for 5 stars !!!!! When?
reviews.review_description:
I would easily give a 5 star if only: 
1- we could save our game
2-we could easily take the delivered items
3-sitting mode available

Is the developer still work on it ???, this game need an update ASAP

developer_response.body:
Hello!

Yes, this game is still in development, more updates will come.
Saving game should work. To save the game use the monitor in the office room.
Also sitting mode will be available soon.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: i couldn’t even get to really play the game because important items like the coffee would suddenly stop working and wouldn’t let me interact with it, while other never worked in the first place. ideas would disappear though the counter.

developer_response.body:
I am sorry to hear that, I don't know what could cause this and it is the first time I hear about. If you can please give me more details about when does it happen this I will try to reproduce it myself.
Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Update 3/30/24:  The game still does not save😡.  Beekeeping sim is saving now but not this game.  I have factory reset my headset since I tried last and reinstalled the game.  Please fix this🙏. 
 I have some ideas for the game but I see you don't have a Discord.  You should think about setting one up for all your games.  It's a great way to work with the community on your game to make it as successful as possible.  I am involved with a lot of early access games Discords,  and I report bugs, give suggestions and work with the devs to build the best game possible.  It's like having free Beta testers for your game and the community loves to be involved.  Just a thought it is your game so do as you choose.  Anyway keep it up and I look forward to future updates🤔





Update 2/27/24: I bought coffee shop sim and enjoyed it for almost 2 hrs straight.  Save the game at the computer and exited the game.  When I logged back in I realized the game never saved.  
I bought bee keeper simulator and the exact same thing.  Luckily I only played for 30 minutes.
Not sure what the problem is Developers but that is two of your games with same issue.  
I read other reviews and I am not the only one.  
Please stop everything you are doing and prioritize this or you will permanently lose credibility as a developer period.  As soon as you fix both games save feature I will come back and change my review.  Now I am off too beekeeper simulator to give same review.  Copy and paste.  Fix it 🙏 




It is fun if you like food prep and simulation games.  It doesn’t get over hectic so you work at a steady pace once the customers start rolling in.

Suggestions for the developers.

1.  It desperately needs a save function.  I know it is located at the office PC but it does not work.  This should be priority to push out an update with working save.

2.  Should have comfort option such as teleport and snap turn.  I don’t mind smooth locomotion but I like snap turn.  I just turn in real life instead but it should be an option.

3.  Utilize the left controller menu button.  This is where you can map comfort options and sound options also would be nice.  Maybe some easy listening coffee shop elevator style music.  Even better put a jukebox in the shop and link it to YouTube so we can pick our music like in ForeVR bowling has.

4.  Better grab physics.  The doors are hard to open and close.  Even if it was a point at handle with curser and click trigger to open.  Grabbing items also just feals off like it does not line up to where I am trying to grab.

5.  A height adjustment and a seated mode.  The first time I played it I was a giant so I had to redo my guardian height.  Then I got off the game and jumped straight back in without leaving my play space and I was a super short.  I couldn’t even look over the counter.

6.  More variety for NPC’s.  Even if you use same character models and change there hair color and clothes for now.

I think this is a great start to the game though.  I hope the developers keep working to bring it to full potential.  I think if you worked on the things listed it could be a 5 star game someday.  Keep up the good work devs.

reviews.review_title: You need to try it if you enjoy coffee
reviews.review_description:
Is a great game for coffee lovers like me. The attention to detail in the game is impressive and the gameplay is very enjoyable.
It's a must-play for coffee enthusiasts and simulation game fans.

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Dont let anything drop to ground
reviews.review_description:
There is a very annoying bug where the ground is deaper than your ground. If something drop on the ground, good luck to grab it. 

There is no level system. So a lot of costumers come inside and go unhappy, while you try to figure out how things work. 

Good idea, but feels very unfinish.

reviews.review_title: Please add teleport motion & a tutorial
reviews.review_description: I love this style of game and also own Bee Keeper Simulator. I tried playing this and couldn't get to the point where I could open the store because I was so nauseous from moving around getting everything ready!

developer_response.body: I am taking this in consideration for a future update. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This game feel and is very realistic. Developers done a very good job 👏🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This ia one of the finest game simulator on quest!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much!
Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Love this game at first I didn’t know what to do but then I learned how to do it and just love it don’t think it’s worth $15 maybe $6-$12 but ya good game. Also it would be cool if they came to the front instead of them just walking to a table and to like a paper of all orders so you don’t have to keep walking back and forth.

developer_response.body:
Grate ideas and I will take this in consideration for future updates.
Thank you!

reviews.review_description: PLEASE MAKE IT EASIER TO PICK STUFF OFF THE FLOOR. also i think there should be a tutorial in the game cause i didn’t have a clue what i was doing and have very little patience but was fun when i got the hang of it, i know there’s a board with everything on but i can’t read and remember all that and there’s no practice thing to practice the drinks which i think would be good for first joining the game. also please make a sitting down mode i get all dizzy standing up and moving around and crouch of course. other than that the game is fun unless you drop something and can’t bloody pick it up😭 another thing is you could add a screen at the front where they order and u have to mark what the want, then it prints off and you just bring the order to their table

developer_response.body:
In a future update this will be solved.
Thank you for letting me know.

reviews.review_description: Saving still does not work properly, so you can not save the game, which is the most important for this type of game

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thanks for reaching out!

The game was tested on 5 devices and saves work well.
I think the problem could be with the device by preventing the games to create the save file.
Do you have this problem with other games?
I searched the internet and find out that some times users have this problem with some games but nothing that solve this. 
All you can do is reach Meta Quest Support team, maybe they have a clue about or search on internet for more info.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Lovely experience. 
I need more games like this.

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This simulator game should be in the main store 👍🏻

developer_response.body: Maybe one day will be! Thank you!

reviews.review_description: The game's fun, but I want to add a few things that I think would make the game a lot better, especially customer variety and speed. Maybe make the customers eat faster, and allow more to come in at the same time, like 2 customers order together for example. Another thing would be customers walking up to the front instead to get their order then leaving immediately instead of dining in. There's also a save glitch to where it'll load my previous save but I cant save after playing for some time unless I reload the save, deleting the progress I had made. Thank you for reading this!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the grate ideas, I will take them in consideration! Also I will check what is the problem with the saves and I'll fix them.
Thank you so much!

reviews.review_description: This is the best simulator out there

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I really love this game already I can tell I’m gonna really like it just a few things sometimes the I forget what they’re called things you fill with ground up coffee can no clip through the coffee and espresso machine also the trays can no clip through the seats and you lose that cup of coffee I feel like there should be a crouch button cause if you’re playing on carpet and you drop something you can’t pick it up I saved my game and I may have done something wrong but when I loaded it the stuff I had on the counter was gone I might be confused cause I put the milk in the counter fridge and nothing else I had was ever put in a designated spot but I’m giving this 5 stars cause you can’t get it right without failing a few times. Update future me I played more figured out there’s a glitch to get infinite items by buying them putting them in the storage room and loading youre old game with all your money and I figured out you have to put the items in the storage room to save them so should probably fix that infinite item glitch. Another future me don’t know if it tells you I updated it few more glitches if you take off the things that hold the ground up coffee on the espresso machine right when it starts making espresso it glitches it out and it doesn’t work and the cup is glitched too another thing if a tray is left on the table when someone comes in I may be dumb or you have to pick it up but it says the customer was already served. The save button also doesn’t work correctly gotta sit there a lot and just click it over and over

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review. 
I'll check all the things you pointed and in the next update I'll fix them.
Thank you so much!

reviews.review_title: Good graphics but can't start game
reviews.review_description: Can't start the game as I can't open the coffee bag anybody got any ideas because there is no red text either on the coffee bag Help please

developer_response.body: Order coffee bags from the office room PC, go outside and take the bags, grab with one hand the coffee bag and with the other hand grab the top of the coffee bag where it is written with red "Open here"

reviews.review_description: This game is fun to do, but it is extremely glitchy. When I bought food items, it took my money, but nothing appeared in the back where the other items are dropped off. Also, I think the machines should be stable and not easily knocked over. Sometimes the hands are way above ￼my head and I have to restart the game. Other than that it's a new and fresh concept and I really enjoy it.

Items you order fall out of the basket.
So can't carry them all in.
Brush is hard to pick up if you drop it

Cupboards hard to open .
I have to play this sitting down or I get terrible motion sickness...
Be great if you could point and teleport.

Love the idea though .
 looking forward to the updates

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thank you for the review and for letting me know about this issues. I'll fix them in the next update.
About the basket, it have special slots so it can carry only a certain amount at a time. Also the food boxes can't be carried in the basket.

Thank you and let me know here, on www.BendisGames.com or at email: bendisgamesstudio@gmail.com for bugs or ideas for the game.

reviews.review_description:
Would love to see teleport controls for this game. 

Really fun, manage your shop via your own office. Order supplies, fill your shelves and serve your customers! 

Coffee and cakes 🎂 🤓

Clean up your cafe and open up the shop, make enough sales and you can even upgrade your new store with additional terrace skins.

First impressions, very realistic. 

Doors and cupboards a little glitchy to open and close. 

Overall a fun game, look forwards to future updates on the game

Message me for 25% Off 🥰
I really enjoy playing this game and they make updates every week or couple of days.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Enjoy it!

reviews.review_title: I can confirm, this is like the real job
reviews.review_description:
Like real life! I used to work as barista some years ago and this game just remembered me that times.
You make the lists with what you need, order ingredients, brew a lot of coffee(there are a lot of coffee recipes in this game), serve the customers, wipe the floors, throw the garbage, extend the shop for more customers to come, and you have all the time something to do in this game. 
I really enjoy it. 👍🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: The Graphics are just astonishing! Quest need more games like this

developer_response.body: Thank you! Enjoy
